message:
feat: add dotBatch() for fast batch vector search (83x speedup)

New API: tq.dotBatch(query, compressedConcat, bytesPerVector)
- Single WASM call instead of N individual dot() calls
- Query rotated once, not N times
- Eliminates 25K alloc/free cycles for 5K vector search
- 950ms -> 11ms in Node.js benchmarks

Zig: add tq_dot_batch export, make qjl module pub.
JS: add dotBatch() method to TurboQuant class.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "turboquant-wasm",
-  "version": "0.2.5",
+  "version": "0.2.6",
   "description": "TurboQuant WASM SIMD vector compression — 3 bits/dim with fast dot product. Requires relaxed SIMD (Chrome 114+, Firefox 128+, Safari 18+, Node 20+)",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
